English: We sing a song daily.
Telugu: memu roju oka paata paaduttamu.
English: We sing loudly daily.
Telugu: memu roju gattiga paaduttamu.
English: We sing well daily.
Telugu: memu roju baga paaduttamu.
English: We sing a melody daily.
Telugu: memu roju oka melody paaduttamu.
English: We sing a chorus daily.
